response:
Brittany needs to calculate her total shampoo usage for a leap year which has 366 days since she washes her hair every other day she will use the product 183 times at 1/4 ounce per wash resulting in a total of 45.75 ounces needed for the full year.

To determine the number of 14-ounce bottles required she must divide the total ounces by the bottle size and round up to the nearest whole number because she cannot buy partial bottles so she will need 4 bottles to cover her [location] during the [season] ahead.
